vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409
Vehicle context: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach
Application variant: food-grade hygienic design, IP67 sealed joints, NSF-compliant materials
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite, process: CNC + LPBF

verify.rule: All required fields are present and non-empty.
Mass estimate is within expected range for a robot arm link.
All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems.
Critical joints have explicit locking methods and torque/preload intent.
Boundary conditions are defined for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat dissipation from the motor.
risk.mit: Implement a thermal management system to dissipate heat effectively.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and proper routing.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of datum references.
risk.mit: Define primary datum features and include them in the assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient wall thickness.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness to meet structural requirements.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors due to ambiguous assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear and ordered assembly sequence with tools and torque specifications.

physics_paths.path: Base Plate -> Floor
physics_paths.description: Supports the weight of the robot arm and distributes loads to the floor.

physics_paths.path: Motor -> Base Plate -> Environment
physics_paths.description: Heat generated by the motor is dissipated through the base plate to the environment.

physics_paths.path: Motor -> Harmonic Drive -> Arm
physics_paths.description: Rotational motion from the motor is transmitted to the arm through the harmonic drive.

physics_paths.path: Controller -> Cable Entry -> Motor
physics_paths.description: Power and control signals are transmitted from the controller to the motor.

physics_paths.path: Service Access -> Base Joint
physics_paths.description: Enables maintenance and inspection of the base joint.

integration_opportunities.description: Provides access for maintenance and inspection.
Allows for the entry of electrical and control cables.
Enables the base joint to be securely mounted to the floor.

verification_focus.description: Verify that the base plate can support the weight of the robot arm.
Verify that the harmonic drive can dissipate heat effectively.
Verify that the shaft coupling can transmit rotational motion accurately.
Verify that the cable entry can safely and reliably route electrical cables.

generated_parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
generated_parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window
Fixed BOM item inside 6-DOF Industrial Arm
Food-grade hygienic design, IP67 sealed joints, NSF-compliant materials
Driver board bay, power/signal separation along the arm
Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts
P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets
Most geometry_ops include args.at coordinates distributed across the local subsystem volume
Uses drill, pocket, boss, channel, pattern_polar, fillet, chamfer
Every part_tree child has 4+ dedicated geometry_ops
A primary datum feature is explicitly named and placed
Adjacent interfaces include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm
Includes ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step
Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, drill, subtract, pocket
Dimensions match robot_arm scale: 80-400mm per link, 600-1200mm reach
Design loads: payload 2-10kg at tip, joint torque 5-50Nm, 10k+ cycles

risk.desc: Risk of signal interference due to proximity of power_channel and signal_channel.
risk.mit: Increase physical separation between power and signal channels.

risk.desc: Service cover may not provide sufficient access for maintenance.
risk.mit: Review and potentially redesign service cover for better access.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to complex interface fits.
risk.mit: Add alignment features or improve assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening during assembly, leading to damage.
risk.mit: Provide clear torque settings and use torque-limiting tools.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Drive electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

physics_paths.description: Power lines and signal lines run in separate channels.
Thermal inspection window allows for monitoring the internal temperature.
Service cover provides access to ground point for maintenance.

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: 100% visual and CMM
manufacturing_strategy.implications: CNC for complex geometries, LPBF for structural integrity
